{"problem_standardized_math":"Construct the adjacency graph corresponding to a function whose Hessian has the following nonzero pattern:\n\\[\n\\left[\n\\begin{array}{cccccc}\n\\times & \\times & \\times & \\times &  &  \\\\\n\\times & \\times & \\times &  & \\times &  \\\\\n\\times & \\times & \\times &  &  & \\times \\\\\n\\times &  &  & \\times &  &  \\\\\n & \\times &  &  & \\times &  \\\\\n &  & \\times &  &  & \\times\n\\end{array}\n\\right].\n\\]\nThen find a valid coloring of this graph using only four colors."}
